candidates.title: Video Editor & Motion Graphics Designer for AI Cybersecurity SaaS Product Video
candidates.brief: Project Overview We're looking for an experienced video editor and motion graphics designer to create a polished marketing and product demonstration video for our AI-powered cybersecurity platform. Our product helps organizations reduce human cyber risk through a combination of real-time protection, adaptive simulations, and in-the-moment learning. The video will be used on our website, sales presentations, webinars, investor discussions, and social media. We already have a strong foundation of content and materials, including product access, screenshots, existing messaging, whitepapers, and product recordings. We're looking for someone who can help turn those assets into a professional, engaging SaaS product video. Deliverables Primary Deliverable One polished 90-120 second marketing and product demonstration video Cutdown Versions One 30-second promotional cutdown One 15-second teaser

candidates.title: Live-Action App Feature Promo
candidates.tools: After Effects · Premiere Pro · Animate — for scalable vector artwork and layered/retouched assets
candidates.brief: We are launching Spand, a premium, minimalist health-tech and biometric tracking ecosystem. We need an experienced, high-end motion graphics designer to produce a stunning, 60-second product demonstration and promotional video. The aesthetic of our brand is sleek, dark-mode, and minimalist (similar to the design language of Apple Health, Oura, or linear-style tech promotions). The video will blend our app's UI/UX screens, screen recordings of live prototypes, and smooth vector animations to tell a seamless story of automated health tracking. Creative Direction & Aesthetic Style: Clean, premium, professional, minimalist. No cluttered elements, bright cartoonish animations, or aggressive stock transitions. Color Palette: Dominated by a rich, stealth dark background (#141716) combined with crisp white typography and a signature dark slate green brand accent. Pacing: Calm, confident, fluid,

candidates.title: SaaS Marketing Video Producer & Motion Graphics Designer
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price We need a high-quality 60–90 second SaaS marketing video that explains how WiseChatt helps businesses improve customer engagement, automate communications, and scale WhatsApp messaging campaigns. Responsibilities Develop a compelling video concept and storyboard Write or refine the marketing script Create motion graphics and animations Incorporate WiseChatt branding and UI elements Edit product screen recordings and dashboard demonstrations Add professional transitions, captions, and visual effects Integrate voiceover (AI or human voice) Deliver optimized versions for website, LinkedIn, YouTube, and social media What We Will Provide WiseChatt branding assets (logo, colors, fonts) Access to the platform for screen recordings Product information and key features Messaging guidelines and target audience details Required Experience Proven experience creating SaaS or B2B

candidates.title: Short App Explainer Video (Motion Graphics + App Footage)
candidates.brief: Upwork · Fixed price I am looking for a skilled motion graphics designer/video editor to create a short explainer video demonstrating how our application works. We will provide screen recordings/videos/images of the app in action, and your role will be to enhance these with simple motion graphics, visual cues, and clear structure to make the instructions easy to follow. candidates.title: Video Editor & Motion Graphics for AI Cybersecurity SaaS Product Video
candidates.meta: Upwork · Fixed $900 · Posted ~1 min ago · USA
candidates.brief: We need an experienced video editor and motion graphics designer to create a polished marketing and product-demonstration video for our AI-powered cybersecurity platform, for use on our website, sales presentations, webinars, investor discussions and social media. We provide product access, screen recordings/product footage, brand assets/logos, website content, whitepapers and messaging guidance. DELIVERABLES: one polished 90-120 second marketing/product-demo video; a 30-second promotional cutdown; a 15-second teaser cutdown (cutdowns repurposed from the main video); final MP4 exports plus source project files and any editable assets. STYLE: modern B2B SaaS product video combining product footage, motion graphics, animated callouts, captions and visual storytelling (not a cartoon-style explainer) — similar to modern software launch/cybersecurity product videos. Preferred skills: Adobe Pr
